settings.title: Shipping Policy
settings.body:
Domestic Shipping (India)

We ship to all serviceable pin codes across India. Orders are processed within 5-7 business days as each item is handcrafted to order.

Shipping Rates

  • Free shipping on all orders above Rs. 1,499
  • Standard shipping: Rs. 99 (5-7 business days after dispatch)
  • Express shipping: Rs. 199 (2-3 business days after dispatch)

Delivery Timeline

Once your order is dispatched, you will receive a tracking link via email and WhatsApp. Please allow 1-2 extra days for remote locations.

International Shipping

We ship to over 30 countries worldwide via tracked international courier.

International Rates

  • Asia (SAARC countries): $12 USD (7-10 business days)
  • Rest of World: $18 USD (10-14 business days)
  • Free international shipping on orders above $150 USD

Customs & Duties

International orders may be subject to import taxes, customs duties, and fees levied by the destination country. These charges are the buyer's responsibility and are not included in our pricing.

Order Processing

All products are handcrafted, so please allow 5-7 business days for preparation before dispatch. During festive seasons, processing times may extend to 10-12 business days.

Packaging

Every order is carefully wrapped in eco-friendly packaging — recycled paper, cotton pouches, and minimal plastic. We believe beautiful packaging should not cost the earth.
